name: Lycopodium Limited
analysis: LYL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 1% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$17.8200. Trade idea: entry A$18.9900, stop A$14.9886, target A$30.9942 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
